title: dryopteris dejecta
intro: Dryopteris dejecta, also known as the dejected wood fern or autumn fern, is a type of flowering plant in the genus Dryopteris. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris dejecta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Dryopteris dejecta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies.
